prompt: Create a dashboard page that shows user statistics fetched from `/api/stats`, has a tabbed layout (overview/analytics/settings) where the active tab is in the URL, and a notification system where toasts can be triggered from anywhere in the app. React + TypeScript.

assertions.text: No bare useStore() — all store access uses selectors like useStore((s) => s.field)
Stats data fetched via useQuery, not useState+useEffect+fetch
Active tab state comes from URL/router params, not useState or Zustand
Notification/toast state managed in a Zustand store (global UI state)
Notification store includes a reset() method
Three-way split: stats in TQ, tabs in URL, notifications in Zustand — each in the right place
Query keys follow [domain, action, params] pattern
Interactive elements (tab buttons, notification dismissals) have data-testid attributes
